title: Changchun, Jilin — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Changchun, Jilin: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Changchun is a city in Jilin with a population of 9,066,000. Capital of Jilin province, known as China’s ‘Auto City’ as home to FAW Group, with broad boulevards and a park-filled urban landscape.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
